summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Salary Breakup feature. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (1 minor validation test failed). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright - Admin Salary tab with CTC input, earnings/deductions breakdown, adjustments; Employee My Salary page with Net pay card, download buttons, salary breakdown.

minor.issue: Invalid month format (e.g., 'invalid-month') returns 200 instead of 400 - API accepts any string but returns valid data if it can parse

GET_employees_id_salary.description: Admin can get employee salary structure with all components (Basic, HRA, DA, Conveyance, Medical, Special Allowance, PF, ESI, Professional Tax, TDS)

PUT_employees_id_salary.description: Admin can update CTC and auto-calculate salary breakup using Indian payroll standards (40% Basic, 50% HRA of Basic, etc.)

GET_employees_id_salary_adjustments.description: Admin can list all adjustments for an employee

POST_employees_id_salary_adjustments.description: Admin can create adjustment (bonus/deduction/reimbursement) with one_time or recurring frequency

GET_employees_id_payslip_month.description: Get monthly payslip with earnings, deductions, adjustments, and net pay calculation

GET_employee_profile_salary.description: Employee can get their own salary structure and adjustments

admin_salary_tab_ui.description: Admin Employee Details modal has Salary tab with: CTC display, Update CTC input, Earnings breakdown (Basic, HRA, DA, Conveyance, Medical, Special Allowance), Deductions breakdown (PF, ESI, Professional Tax, TDS), Monthly Net Salary, Salary Adjustments section

admin_adjustment_modal.description: Add Salary Adjustment modal has: Type dropdown (Bonus, Incentive, etc.), Description input, Amount input, Frequency (One Time/Recurring), Applicable Month picker

employee_my_salary_page.description: My Salary page at /employee/salary shows: Net Pay This Month prominently, Month selector, Simple Slip and Detailed Payslip download buttons, Earnings breakdown card, Deductions breakdown card, Annual CTC display

employee_permission_check.description: Employee cannot update salary (403) or create adjustments (403)

salary_calculations.description: Salary components add up correctly: Gross = sum of earnings, Net = Gross - Total Deductions

seed_data_creation: Salary structure already existed for testemployee with CTC 600000. Created and cleaned up test adjustments during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Salary Breakup feature fully implemented and tested. Backend uses db.salary_structures and db.salary_adjustments collections. Admin routes: GET/PUT /api/employees/{id}/salary, GET/POST/DELETE /api/employees/{id}/salary/adjustments, GET /api/employees/{id}/payslip/{month}. Employee route: GET /api/employee-profile/salary. Salary tab added to Employee Details modal in Employees.js. New EmployeeSalary.js page at /employee/salary with 'My Salary' sidebar link. Payslip generates printable HTML for simple and detailed views.
